query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(720002, 'What does Hebrews demonstrate about Christ?', 'multiple_choice', '["His superiority to Old Testament institutions", "His equality with angels", "His dependence on the Levitical priesthood", "His continuation of the old covenant"]', 'His superiority to Old Testament institutions', 1),
(720002, 'To whom was Hebrews written?', 'multiple_choice', '["Jewish Christians tempted to return to Judaism", "Gentile Christians in Rome", "The church at Corinth", "Timothy"]', 'Jewish Christians tempted to return to Judaism', 2),
(720002, 'According to James 2:17, what is faith without works?', 'multiple_choice', '["Dead", "Alive", "Sufficient", "Complete"]', 'Dead', 3),
(720002, 'Who likely wrote the book of James?', 'multiple_choice', '["Jesus'' brother James", "James the apostle", "James the Less", "An unknown author"]', 'Jesus'' brother James', 4),
(720002, 'What does 1 Peter encourage believers facing persecution to do?', 'multiple_choice', '["Follow Christ''s example of patient endurance", "Fight back against persecutors", "Flee to safety", "Compromise their faith"]', 'Follow Christ''s example of patient endurance', 5),
(720002, 'What does 2 Peter warn against?', 'multiple_choice', '["False teachers who deny Christ''s return", "The Judaizers", "Roman persecution", "Church divisions"]', 'False teachers who deny Christ''s return', 6),
(720002, 'According to Hebrews 1:1-3, how has God spoken in these last days?', 'multiple_choice', '["Through His Son", "Through prophets only", "Through angels", "Through the Law"]', 'Through His Son', 7),
(720002, 'What does Jude encourage believers to do?', 'multiple_choice', '["Contend for the faith", "Avoid all conflict", "Accept all teachings", "Leave the church"]', 'Contend for the faith', 8),
(720002, 'Who wrote the book of Jude?', 'multiple_choice', '["Jesus'' brother Jude", "The apostle Judas", "Judas Iscariot", "An unknown author"]', 'Jesus'' brother Jude', 9),
(720002, 'What does James address regarding the tongue?', 'multiple_choice', '["The need to tame it", "Its power to heal", "Its unimportance", "Its perfection in believers"]', 'The need to tame it', 10),
(720002, 'Explain how Hebrews presents Christ as superior to the Levitical priesthood and why this matters for believers.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Christ is the perfect High Priest who offered Himself as the once-for-all sacrifice, providing complete and permanent access to God unlike the repeated sacrifices of the Levitical system.', 11);
command:

(720002, 'According to Hebrews 1:1-3, how has God spoken in these last days?', 'multiple_choice', '["Through His Son", "Through prophets only", "Through angels", "Through the Law"]', 'Through His Son', 7),

(720002, 'Explain how Hebrews presents Christ as superior to the Levitical priesthood and why this matters for believers.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Christ is the perfect High Priest who offered Himself as the once-for-all sacrifice, providing complete and permanent access to God unlike the repeated sacrifices of the Levitical system.', 11);
